name: Elegy
bio:
Avenger of the Demon Faction who swore revenge after being betrayed. He uses guns and cannons to eliminate enemies that stand in his way.

Role: Physical Damage Dealer
Specialty: A mid-backline Breakthrough-type hero that can launch continuous shots; deals massive damage to enemy backlines and applies Curse.

skillSlots.name: Dawn Hunting
skillSlots.description: Randomly attacks mid/backline enemies 3 times for 100% P.DMG per hit with 20% additional Crit Rate.

skillSlots.name: Eternal Nightfall
skillSlots.description: Attacks 1 lowest-DEF enemy in mid/backline, dealing 3 instances of 140% P.DMG with 30% additional Crit Rate for this attack.

effects.name: Shadow Sniper
effects.description: Gains 1 stack of [Sniper Focus] when attacks Crit.

effects.name: Shadow Sniper
effects.description: Consumes all [Sniper Focus] to activate [Dawn Hunting] when [Sniper Focus] reaches 5 stacks (this effect triggers at most twice per turn).

effects.name: Shadow Sniper
effects.description: Has 30% probability to apply [Sigil] when attacks Crit.

effects.name: Shadow Sniper
effects.description: Attacks gain 30% additional Crit Rate against targets below 60% HP.
